turns.user_message: Build me an agent that translates English idioms into Czech slang based on a user-provided context.

result.message: Opening persona creation with your intent and starting the build.

clientAction.intent: Translate English idioms into Czech slang, taking a user-provided context block (situation, audience, register) into account when picking the slang variant. Input: an English idiom + optional context. Output: the Czech slang equivalent plus a one-line gloss explaining the choice.
clientAction.name: Idiom → Czech Slang

turns.user_message: Show me more about the first one.

assertions.name: quick_replies_min[1]

turns.user_message: Forget the gallery, just build a Sentry-to-Slack agent for me from scratch.

result.message: Building autonomously now — I'll let you know when it's ready (or surface what blocked it). Opening Personas so you can watch.
